meta.note: Export of live workflow fHwWy4ORPfHnUu5o. Credentials referenced by ID in n8n: Supabase dsZvYaB5av1RwbxL, Anthropic mXPwb5lEbxPFmxDt. NO email nodes (tester mode).

values.content: =Based on this aggregated portfolio data for the Olive Living design and project management dashboard: {{ JSON.stringify($json.aggregates) }} . Generate exactly 4 projections, one for each projection_type: Timeline, Budget, ROI, Risk. Return a STRICT JSON array of exactly 4 objects. Each object must have keys: projection_type (one of Timeline, Budget, ROI, Risk); projection_title (short descriptive string); data (object that must contain confidence_level as a number between 0 and 1, insights as an array of 3-5 strings, plus type-specific fields: projected_completion_months for Timeline, projected_total_cost_inr and variance_percent for Budget, projected_roi_percent and payback_period_months for ROI, risk_score_out_of_10 and top_risks as an array of strings for Risk). Respond with ONLY the JSON array. No markdown fences, no prose outside the JSON array.

options.system: You are a portfolio analyst for real estate development projects in India. You always respond with a single valid JSON array and nothing else.

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ JSON.stringify({ projection_count: $('Parse Projections').all().length, types: $('Parse Projections').all().map(i => i.json.projection_type), generated_at: $now.toISO() }) }}

parameters.content:
## DD-5 Projections Generator
Two triggers: weekly Monday 09:00 schedule (set workflow timezone to Asia/Kolkata in Workflow Settings) AND POST /webhook/projections-generator for on-demand runs (responds immediately with an accepted message).

Aggregates projects + investment_requirements + team_tasks, asks Claude for 4 projections (Timeline, Budget, ROI, Risk) as strict JSON, inserts them into projections with recipients_emails = akashsakhrani05@gmail.com (tester constant), and writes an audit_logs row (projections_generated).

Tester mode: NO email nodes - projections are stored for the dashboard to display.
Manual step: repoint Supabase credential dsZvYaB5av1RwbxL to https://fwzdhmobfcwsspobrvdl.supabase.co (service_role key).
